command: mkdir -p /mosquitto/config && echo 'listener 1883 0.0.0.0' > /mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf && echo 'allow_anonymous true' >> /mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf && echo 'log_dest stdout' >> /mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf && echo 'log_type all' >> /mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf && echo 'connection_messages true' >> /mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf && mosquitto -c /mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf
